text.title: ADR Consequence Evidence Binding Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: name-thresholds
step.action: Pick numeric threshold + direction per item.

step.name: bind-anchors
step.action: Wire each consequence to a CI script / dashboard / log query.
